title: Feature Request: When "Overwrite Oldest" is enabled, do not overwrite if contact 'favourite'

messages.author: brad28b
messages.text: I have "Overwrite Oldest" enabled in my Contact settings. My device (RAK4631) see's over 600 contacts, but can only store 350. "Overwrite Oldest" works well, but it would be better if it did not overwrite any contact that has been marked as a 'favourite'.
messages.content_html: I have "Overwrite Oldest" enabled in my Contact settings. My device (RAK4631) see's over 600 contacts, but can only store 350. "Overwrite Oldest" works well, but it would be better if it did not overwrite any contact that has been marked as a 'favourite'.
messages.reactions_html: 3
